ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program area */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., Lower Division Transfer, Career Technical, ESOL) */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "program_director" TEXT /* Name of the program director */,
  "program_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program area */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Summer, Fall, Winter, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_count" REAL /* Total enrollment count for the program in the given semester and year */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped, graduated) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_semester FOREIGN KEY ("semester") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Summer, Fall, Winter, Spring) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "semester_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the semester in weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2020-2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_areas" (
  "program_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program area */,
  "program_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the program area (e.g., Lower Division Transfer) */,
  "program_area_description" TEXT /* Description of the program area */,
  "program_area_director" TEXT /* Name of the program area director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program area the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program area the course belongs to */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "course_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "course_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "course_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the student took the course */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the student took the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Attendance percentage of the student in the course */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_outcomes" (
  "program_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program outcome */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program area */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the program outcome (e.g., graduation rate) */,
  "outcome_value" REAL /* Value of the program outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was measured */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of the outcome (e.g., graduation rate, job placement rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "student_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student demographic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic (e.g., age, ethnicity) */,
  "demographic_value" TEXT /* Value of the demographic */,
  "demographic_type" TEXT /* Type of the demographic (e.g., age, ethnicity, gender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_area_outcomes" (
  "program_area_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program area outcome */,
  "program_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program area */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the program area outcome (e.g., retention rate) */,
  "outcome_value" REAL /* Value of the program area outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was measured */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of the outcome (e.g., retention rate, satisfaction rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_area_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_area_outcomes_program_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_area_id") REFERENCES program_areas ("program_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Device and browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the instructor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date of hire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instructor (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the student took the course */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the student took the course */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Credits earned by the student in the course */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_transcripts_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_transcripts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
